problem_text_cn: 1452 用混合法测量冰的比熔解热。[可供仪器和用具] 量热器、水银温度计、物理天平、纯水、冰、铁架和夹子等。[要求] (1) 写出混合法测量冰熔解热公式；(2) 选择最佳实验参数，尽可能减少实验系统误差；(3) 测量冰的比熔解热。
problem_text_en: 1452 Measure the specific fusion heat of ice using the mixing method. [Available instruments and tools] Calorimeter, mercury thermometer, physical balance, pure water, ice, iron stand and clamps, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the formula for measuring the fusion heat of ice using the mixing method; (2) Select the best experimental parameters to minimize systematic errors as much as possible; (3) Measure the specific fusion heat of ice.
img_cn: 图1452_1：混合法测冰熔解热装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1452_1: Mixing method for measuring ice fusion heat device and data processing
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】0℃冰熔化为水并升温至θ₂，吸收热量$m\lambda + mc\theta_2$；量热器、搅拌器和水放出热量$(Mc + M_1c_1)(\theta_1 - \theta_2)$，热平衡得$\lambda = \frac{Mc + M_1c_1}{m}(\theta_1 - \theta_2) - c\theta_2$。代入数据：$M = 201.240\ \mathrm{g}$，$M_1 = 144.160\ \mathrm{g}$，$c = 4.180 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/(kg \cdot K)}$，$c_1 = 385\ \mathrm{J/(kg \cdot K)}$，$\theta_1 = 31.39\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$\theta_2 = 19.77\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$m = 25.400\ \mathrm{g}$，得$\lambda = 327.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$，与标准值$332.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$百分差约1.5%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Ice at 0℃ melts into water and warms to θ₂, absorbing heat $m\lambda + mc\theta_2$; calorimeter, stirrer and water release heat $(Mc + M_1c_1)(\theta_1 - \theta_2)$. Heat balance gives $\lambda = \frac{Mc + M_1c_1}{m}(\theta_1 - \theta_2) - c\theta_2$. Substituting data: $M = 201.240\ \mathrm{g}$, $M_1 = 144.160\ \mathrm{g}$, $c = 4.180 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/(kg \cdot K)}$, $c_1 = 385\ \mathrm{J/(kg \cdot K)}$, $\theta_1 = 31.39\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $\theta_2 = 19.77\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $m = 25.400\ \mathrm{g}$, get $\lambda = 327.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$, with a percentage difference of about 1.5% from the standard value $332.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$.
problem_answer: 冰的比熔解热：$\boldsymbol{327.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}}$；与标准值百分差：$\boldsymbol{\approx 1.5\%}$；测量关键：初温高于室温、终温低于露点，减小与外界热交换。
